mnemonics.title: Hadoop Core Components - CHMY
mnemonics.content: C - Common (utilities/libraries), H - HDFS (distributed file system), M - MapReduce (processing model), Y - YARN (resource negotiator). Think: 'CHeMistrY creates Hadoop'.

mnemonics.title: YARN Components - RNAC
mnemonics.content: R - ResourceManager (global scheduler), N - NodeManager (per-node agent), A - ApplicationMaster (per-app component), C - Container (resource unit). Think: 'RNAC manages the rack'.

mnemonics.title: HDFS Fault Tolerance - RRH
mnemonics.content: R - Replication (3 copies default), R - Rack awareness (cross-rack placement), H - Heartbeat monitoring (3-second interval). Think: 'RRH keeps data safe'.

mnemonics.title: HDFS Block Placement - SDS
mnemonics.content: S - Same node as writer (1st replica), D - Different rack (2nd replica), S - Same rack as 2nd, different node (3rd replica). Think: 'SDS ensures survival'.
